title: Develop a coastal rehabilitation strategy
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a coastal rehabilitation strategy demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine coastal resources and assets

pcs.text: Source available information and seek advice from current land management stakeholders for coastal site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source available information and seek advice from current land management stakeholders for coastal site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source available information and seek advice from current land management stakeholders for coastal site.

pcs.text: Conduct site survey to determine biophysical elements, resources and threats
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct site survey to determine biophysical elements, resources and threats?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct site survey to determine biophysical elements, resources and threats.

pcs.text: Identify cultural and heritage sites within zone and assess need for an archaeological assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify cultural and heritage sites within zone and assess need for an archaeological assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify cultural and heritage sites within zone and assess need for an archaeological assessment.

pcs.text: Determine resource use, management stakeholders and the requirements and opportunities for consultation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine resource use, management stakeholders and the requirements and opportunities for consultation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine resource use, management stakeholders and the requirements and opportunities for consultation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine coastal resources and assets

elements.title: Establish condition of coastal area

pcs.text: Assess current ecological and environmental condition of resources within the coastal area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess current ecological and environmental condition of resources within the coastal area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess current ecological and environmental condition of resources within the coastal area.

pcs.text: Assess the impact of threats on the resources and assets in the area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the impact of threats on the resources and assets in the area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the impact of threats on the resources and assets in the area.

pcs.text: Present preliminary findings on the coastal resource and its condition to stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present preliminary findings on the coastal resource and its condition to stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present preliminary findings on the coastal resource and its condition to stakeholders.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Establish condition of coastal area

elements.title: Develop a strategy to rehabilitate the coastal area

pcs.text: Analyse findings and identify management options
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse findings and identify management options?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse findings and identify management options.

pcs.text: Present findings to managing authority and seek direction on drafting management actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present findings to managing authority and seek direction on drafting management actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present findings to managing authority and seek direction on drafting management actions.

pcs.text: Implement processes for consultation with stakeholders according to workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement processes for consultation with stakeholders according to workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement processes for consultation with stakeholders according to workplace policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Establish strategy, and prioritise activities for asset rehabilitation and improvement in accordance with environmental sustainability practices, legislative and regulatory requirements and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish strategy, and prioritise activities for asset rehabilitation and improvement in accordance with environmental sustainability practices, legislative and regulatory requirements and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish strategy, and prioritise activities for asset rehabilitation and improvement in accordance with environmental sustainability practices, legislative and regulatory requirements and industry standards.

pcs.text: Design management plan for implementation of strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design management plan for implementation of strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design management plan for implementation of strategy.

pcs.text: Document management and stakeholder approvals of plan according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document management and stakeholder approvals of plan according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document management and stakeholder approvals of plan according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Obtain formal approval from coastal site authority
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain formal approval from coastal site authority?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain formal approval from coastal site authority.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop a strategy to rehabilitate the coastal area

elements.title: Implement and monitor the strategy and action plan

pcs.text: Seek funding and labour resources to implement rehabilitation works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek funding and labour resources to implement rehabilitation works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek funding and labour resources to implement rehabilitation works.

pcs.text: Coordinate works with stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate works with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate works with stakeholders.

pcs.text: Monitor progress of works according to management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor progress of works according to management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor progress of works according to management plan.

pcs.text: Monitor workforce according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and environmental policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor workforce according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and environmental policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor workforce according to workplace health and safety, biosecurity and environmental policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Implement and monitor the strategy and action plan

elements.title: Evaluate rehabilitation strategy

pcs.text: Review management plan, consider improvements and recommend changes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review management plan, consider improvements and recommend changes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review management plan, consider improvements and recommend changes according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor changes in coastal resource conditions, and review effectiveness of strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor changes in coastal resource conditions, and review effectiveness of strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor changes in coastal resource conditions, and review effectiveness of strategy.

pcs.text: Report findings to management and stakeholders with recommendations for adjustments to strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report findings to management and stakeholders with recommendations for adjustments to strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report findings to management and stakeholders with recommendations for adjustments to strategy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Evaluate rehabilitation strategy

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
